dataRoles.name: contextFields
dataRoles.description: Dimensions and measures that define this page's story. Arrives already filtered by every active slicer/filter — this is what the agent 'sees'. A visual can only read fields bound here, so bind the Region/Year/etc. you want the agent aware of.

dataRoles.name: answerText
dataRoles.description: Bind the ANSWER_TEXT column returned by the Cortex answer query. The agent's reply lands here as a row of data after you ask a question.

dataRoles.name: promptField
dataRoles.description: Bind PromptBinding[Prompt] here. Filters applied by a visual appear to be honored only when the visual owns the target field — bind it here on the same visual, or on a second input-only instance.
